positive: A stylized and highly symmetrical geometric pattern of constellations and celestial bodies, rendered in a dark midnight blue and glowing gold foil style. The composition features abstract zodiac signs formed by elegant connecting lines, interwoven with minimalist depictions of crescent moons, five-pointed stars, and planetary orbits. The style should be neo-art deco, clean line art, high contrast, and suitable for repeating textile print. The layout must be centered and visually balanced, with a subtle glow emanating from the stars. Digital illustration, vector graphic quality, symmetry, high detail, flat layers.
negative: blur, messy, noise, text, watermark, low resolution, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, signature, logo, smudge, messy lines
